title: Nested JSON Extraction
scenario: Given a nested JSON object representing a hierarchical company structure, extract the names of all direct managers in the chain of command for a given employee ID. The output should be a list of names in the format ['John Doe', 'Jane Smith', 'Alice Johnson'].
constraints: Must be formatted as a valid JSON list
Each manager's name should be in title case

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the output is a valid JSON list.
Verify that each manager's name is in title case.
Check if all direct manager names are correctly extracted.
